name: Goldblatt + Singer
positioning_claim: Goldblatt + Singer presents itself as a long-established St. Louis injury firm, drawing on 77 years of local heritage and a claim of former insurance-defense experience to signal courtroom credibility.

name: Cantor
positioning_claim: Cantor Injury Law positions itself around its founder's personal brand, presenting Mark Cantor as an accessible, dependable local advocate for everyday injury victims.

name: Simon Law
positioning_claim: Simon Law Firm positions itself as a premier trial practice led by a nationally recognized attorney, emphasizing major verdicts, deep resources, and readiness to take every case to trial.

name: Schultz & Myers
positioning_claim: Schultz & Myers positions itself as an aggressive, results-driven personal injury firm with particular depth in tractor-trailer and trucking cases.

name: Cofman Townsley
positioning_claim: Cofman Townsley positions itself as an approachable, family-oriented firm that emphasizes real client results and personal, testimonial-driven service.

name: Bruning
positioning_claim: The Bruning Law Firm positions itself as a multigenerational family practice, emphasizing community roots and a modern, client-first approach to injury cases.

name: Brown & Crouppen
positioning_claim: Brown & Crouppen positions itself as a high-visibility, high-volume St. Louis injury firm, leaning on decades of advertising presence and more than a billion dollars recovered.

name: Morgan & Morgan
positioning_claim: Morgan & Morgan positions itself as America's largest injury firm, emphasizing nationwide scale, the For the People brand, and aggressive advocacy against insurers.

name: OnderLaw
positioning_claim: OnderLaw positions itself as a national mass-tort specialist, emphasizing award recognition and a track record of large-scale injury and pharmaceutical litigation.

name: DM Law
positioning_claim: DM Law positions itself as a founder-led, settlement-focused injury practice serving the St. Louis and Kansas City markets with a conventional, client-service approach.
